As per UGC Public Notice No.F.4-1(UGC-NET Review Committee/2024(NET) /140648 dzted 27- 03-2024, the NET Score can be used for admission into the Ph.D. Programme. The UGC-NET(JR-F) Qualified students can be admitted into the Ph.D, Programme based on an Interview as per UGC Guidelines. However, for students who haye qualilied UGC-NET for Admission into Ph.D. Programme, 707o weightage will be given for Test Scores and 307o weightage for the Interview for admission into the Ph.D, Programme. The Ph,D, admission will be made based on the combined merit of NET marks and the marks obtained in the Interview/Viva-Voce, Preference will be given first to the UGC-NET(JRF)ruGC-NET qualified candidates. Those Candidates, who hav€ not qualified in the UGC-NET(JRF)/UGC-NET, can atso be admitted through Entrance Test conducted by the University and followed by an InterviedViva-Voce as per the releYant Regulations. Reservation policy ofthe State Govemment will be followed for admission. The syllabus of the Entrance Test shall consist of 50% Research Methodology and 50% subject sDecific. A 7 . An Interview/Viva-Voce will be organized by the respective department, where the candidates are required to discuss the research interest/ area through a presentation before the RAC of the department. 8. Candidate merely qualifying in the entrance examination has no right to claim for admission and the decision taken by the University authority shall be final. Admission shall be made as per the merit list. Stipend with bachelor's accommodation will be provided to the deserving candidates, selected to pursue Ph.D. Programme on full time basis as per the norms of the GIET University, Gunupur For any clarifications, please mail to Ph.D. Section:- phdadmission@giet.edu Important Ddtes Sl.
